title: Document sidecar cache invariants in CLAUDE.md
description: Add a Must-know constraints subsection covering: cache path, file format, version bump semantics, invalidation rules, security posture, fallback when rekordbox_dir is not writable.
acceptanceCriteria: CLAUDE.md (or .claude/project/db-constraints.md per the existing CLAUDE.md depth pattern) documents: file path, schema version, when to invalidate, what is NOT stored.
Doc references the relevant tasks (TASK-010..018) by ID.
Doc explicitly states the cache contains no audio, no Discogs token, no SQLCipher key.
Doc states the AUTOCUE_POOL_SIZE env var and AUTOCUE_DOWNLOAD_DIR convention (existing pattern).
Reviewers can read just this section to understand the cache contract.

steps.details: Per CLAUDE.md's 'Depth - read on demand' pattern, large details go to .claude/project/. The cache invariants are high-frequency reads for future Claude sessions, so put them in CLAUDE.md (under Must-know constraints) AND a longer reference in .claude/project/cache-design.md.

Add a bullet under §3 Must-know constraints. One short paragraph: 'Sidecar analysis cache lives at <rekordbox_dir>/autocue_cache.sqlite. Plain SQLite (no credentials). Invalidate on /api/restore (TASK-017). Cue edits invalidate only mixability (TASK-016). ANLZ-missing tracks store anlz_mtime=-1 sentinel (TASK-012). Schema version bumps drop+recreate all tables.'
Full DDL, BLOB layout, L1/L2 hierarchy, warm-up sequence, cancellation semantics, test fixtures.
Update .agent/prd/PERFORMANCE_PRD.md §7 to reference cache-design.md for the canonical version of the schema (PRD remains for design rationale; cache-design.md is the implementation reference).

technicalNotes: CLAUDE.md should stay under 500 lines per the context-engineering rules - keep the Must-know entry to ~3 lines and offload the rest to the depth file.
